languages.text: "К тому же, что и всегда — получению удовольствия от жизни путем удовлетворения наших низменных потребностей".
"The same as ever — to draw pleasure from life by satisfying our baser needs."
languages.original_text: "К тому же, что и всегда — получению удовольствия от жизни путем удовлетворения наших низменных потребностей".

traits.locale_text: "The same as ever — to draw pleasure from life by satisfying our baser needs."
"The same as ever — to draw pleasure from life by satisfying our baser needs."
"The same as ever — to draw pleasure from life by satisfying our baser needs."

languages.text: 「いつもと同じように、卑劣な欲求を満たすことで、人生の喜びを得る」
languages.original_text: "The same as ever — to draw pleasure from life by satisfying our baser needs."

traits.locale_text: 「いつもと同じように、卑劣な欲求を満たすことで、人生の喜びを得る」

languages.text: “这答案亘古不变——通过满足我们的原始需求，从生命中汲取欢愉。”
languages.original_text: "The same as ever — to draw pleasure from life by satisfying our baser needs."

traits.locale_text: “这答案亘古不变——通过满足我们的原始需求，从生命中汲取欢愉。”

languages.text: «La misma de siempre: obtener placer de la vida satisfaciendo nuestras necesidades más vulgares».
languages.original_text: "The same as ever — to draw pleasure from life by satisfying our baser needs."

traits.locale_text: «La misma de siempre: obtener placer de la vida satisfaciendo nuestras necesidades más vulgares».

languages.text: "Wir streben danach, das Leben zu genießen, indem wir unsere Grundbedürfnisse befriedigen."
languages.original_text: "The same as ever — to draw pleasure from life by satisfying our baser needs."

traits.locale_text: "Wir streben danach, das Leben zu genießen, indem wir unsere Grundbedürfnisse befriedigen."

languages.text: « Comme toujours : tirer du plaisir de la vie en satisfaisant nos besoins primaires. »
languages.original_text: "The same as ever — to draw pleasure from life by satisfying our baser needs."

traits.locale_text: « Comme toujours : tirer du plaisir de la vie en satisfaisant nos besoins primaires. »

languages.text: "Temel ihtiyaçlarımızı karşılayarak hayattan zevk almak için."
languages.original_text: "The same as ever — to draw pleasure from life by satisfying our baser needs."

traits.locale_text: "Temel ihtiyaçlarımızı karşılayarak hayattan zevk almak için."
